Thanks for contributing to ForzaTunes! A short, focused description goes a
long way. Keep PRs scoped to one concern.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- 1-3 sentences describing the change. -->

## Why

<!-- User problem, bug, or motivation behind the change. -->

## How to verify

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow locally, or screenshots for UI changes.
For DB-touching changes, mention whether migrations are included. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No new file exceeds 500 lines
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, real account IDs, or D1 database IDs committed
- [ ] If a new manager method was added, both D1 and demo implementations were updated
- [ ] If UI-facing, tested in `DEMO_MODE=true` so reviewers can click through
